# komodo_action (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo action resource by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_action" "example" {
  id = "my-action"
}

output "action_schedule" {
  value = data.komodo_action.example.schedule
}
```

## Argument Reference

- `id` (Required) - The action identifier (ObjectId or name).

## Attribute Reference

- `name` - The unique name of the action.
- `run_at_startup` - Whether the action runs at Komodo startup.
- `schedule_format` - The schedule format: `Cron` or `English`.
- `schedule` - The schedule expression.
- `schedule_enabled` - Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `schedule_timezone` - Timezone for the schedule (IANA TZ identifier).
- `schedule_alert` - Whether an alert is sent on scheduled runs.
- `failure_alert` - Whether an alert is sent on action failure.
- `webhook_enabled` - Whether webhook triggering is enabled.
- `webhook_secret` - The webhook secret override (sensitive).
- `reload_deno_deps` - Whether Deno dependencies are reloaded on each run.
- `file_contents` - TypeScript file contents using the Komodo client.
- `arguments_format` - The format for action arguments.
- `arguments` - Default arguments passed to the action as the `ARGS` variable.
